firstProductTitle.description: First product title in search results — text varies by search query, use textContains with brand/keyword

notNowButton.description: NOT NOW button on notification/location permission popups

resultsScrollView.description: Search results list — scrollable container; scroll down to reveal more products

cartIcon.description: Cart icon in top-right header — shows item count badge; no stable resource-id; coordinate tap (653,140)
